VIN_VSS_0_3_to_4_0.parameter: Input voltage on any other pin

ΔVDD.parameter: Variations between different VDD power pins

ΔVSS.parameter: Variations between all the different ground pins

ΣIVDD.parameter: Total current into sum of all VDD_x power lines (source)

ΣIVSS.parameter: Total current out of sum of all VSS_x ground lines (sink)

IVDD.parameter: Maximum current into each VDD_x power line (source)

IVSS.parameter: Maximum current out of each VSS_x ground line (sink)

IIO.parameter: Output current sourced by any I/O and control pin

VDDA.parameter: Analog operating voltage (ADC limited to 1.2 M samples)
VDDA.conditions: Must be the same potential as VDD

VDDA_Must_be_the_same_potential_as.parameter: Analog operating voltage (ADC limited to 2.4 M samples)
VDDA_Must_be_the_same_potential_as.conditions: Must be the same potential as VDD

IDD.conditions: 84 MHz, all peripherals enabled, VDD = 1.8 V

IDD_84_MHz__all_peripherals_enable.conditions: 84 MHz, all peripherals enabled, VDD = 1.8 V

IDD_STOP.parameter: Low-power regulator usage current in Stop mode
IDD_STOP.conditions: VDD = 3.3 V, Flash in Stop mode, all oscillators OFF, no IWDG

IDD_STOP_VDD___3_3_V__Flash_in_Stop_mod.parameter: Low-power regulator usage current in Stop mode
IDD_STOP_VDD___3_3_V__Flash_in_Stop_mod.conditions: VDD = 3.3 V, Flash in Stop mode, all oscillators OFF, no IWDG
